headline: Agoda Unveils Taiwan H1 Travel Insights: Bangkok Exits Top Five; Philippines Leads Inbound Travel Interest Growth
summary: Digital travel platform Agoda has released the latest insights on travel trends in Taiwan for the first half of 2026, revealing notable shifts in both outbound and inbound travel patterns, based on accommodation searches made between January and June 2026 compared to 2025. While popular destinations in Japan and South Korea continue to see strong travel interest, long-standing favorite Bangkok has unexpectedly dropped out of the top five, as emerging destinations like Miyako Island and even long
